CONNECT YOUR NEWSLETTER
WITH THE TOOLS YOU LOVE
Seamless integrations with analytics, e-commerce, and automation platforms.
Sign up for free
Effortlessly connect with Stripe, Zapier, Google Analytics, and more.
Enhance your workflow with AI-powered recommendations and segmentation.
Sync your subscribers with CRM and marketing automation platforms.
GOT QUESTIONS?
WE'VE GOT ANSWERS.
What makes us the best newsletter platform?
beehiiv combines powerful newsletter features, a no-code website builder, advanced analytics, and the industry's largest native ad network in one platform. Its ease of use, combined with a full suite of growth and monetization features, makes it the best newsletter platform for creators and brands of any size.
Can I integrate my existing email list from another newsletter platform?
Yes, you can import subscribers from other platforms in just minutes. Check out our
migration resources here
.
Does beehiiv support selling digital products?
Absolutely. Our newsletter platform lets you monetize your content directly by selling digital products and paid subscriptions, without needing any additional tools or software.
Can I create a newsletter without prior design experience?
Yes. Our platform includes drag-and-drop templates and intuitive editing tools, making it one of the best publishing platforms for beginners and pros alike.
Can I send SMS messages from beehiiv?
beehiiv is an email-focused publishing platform. You cannot send SMS natively, but you can connect to third-party services via our API or webhooks to send messages in response to events or triggers from your beehiiv account.
Is beehiiv suitable for small businesses?
Absolutely. Its user-friendly interface, drag-and-drop editor, and pre-built templates make it easy for small businesses to send professional email newsletters without writing a single line of code.
Can I track the performance of my newsletters?
Of course. beehiiv provides in-depth analytics to track performance and engagement for your newsletter and website, helping you grow your audience over time.
Can you try it for free first, then upgrade later?
Yes! The Launch plan offers a free entry point to the beehiiv ecosystem, providing the essential features you need to get started. As your subscriber list grows and you need more advanced growth and monetization features, you can upgrade to our Scale or Max plans.
READY TO Build?
Own your audience today
Sign up for free
Trial Premium Features

Frequently Asked Questions
Are newsletters considered a form of media?
Newsletters are indeed considered a form of media. They serve as a medium for sharing information, engaging with audiences, and distributing content, much like other traditional and digital media outlets.
How do creators use newsletters effectively?
Creators use newsletters effectively by consistently delivering engaging content, building authentic connections with their audience, utilizing growth strategies to expand their subscriber list, and leveraging monetization options to generate revenue from their newsletters.
What impact do social media algorithms have on content creators?
Social media algorithms significantly influence content creators by determining the visibility and reach of their posts. These algorithms prioritize certain types of content, affecting engagement and ultimately impacting growth and monetization opportunities for creators.
How can creators leverage media to enhance their newsletter content?
Creators can leverage media to enhance their newsletter content by incorporating visuals, audio, and video elements that engage readers and complement the text, ultimately enriching the storytelling experience and attracting a wider audience.
Are newsletters an effective tool for creators to engage with their audience?
Newsletters are an effective tool for creators to engage with their audience. They provide a direct, personalized channel for communication, fostering stronger connections and encouraging ongoing interaction with subscribers.
How can newsletters boost media exposure?
Newsletters can significantly boost media exposure by directly engaging and expanding audiences through targeted content delivery, enhancing brand visibility, and fostering relationships that encourage sharing across platforms.
What strategies do creators use in newsletters?
Creators use various strategies in newsletters, including segmenting their audience for targeted content, creating engaging and valuable material, utilizing strong calls-to-action, and incorporating analytics to refine their approach for better engagement and monetization.
Can social media expand newsletter reach?
Social media can significantly expand newsletter reach by effectively promoting content, engaging audiences, and driving traffic to subscription links. Leveraging social platforms allows creators to tap into wider demographics and attract new subscribers.
Do creators prefer media or newsletters?
Creators often prefer newsletters over other media formats due to their potential for direct engagement, personalized communication, and the ability to effectively monetize their content. Newsletters allow creators to build closer relationships with their audience.
How often should creators send newsletters?
Creators should aim to send newsletters consistently,

Extras
Grow faster. Earn more. Pay less.
Get started for free
From newsletters and podcasts to websites and digital products, beehiiv supports every aspect of your business.
Scale faster with audience growth tools like recommendations and referral programs built directly into the platform.
Turn attention into revenue with paid subscriptions, paid recommendations, and the industry’s largest native ad network.
Frequently Asked Questions
Is beehiiv free to use?
Yes. beehiiv's Launch plan is free, forever, with no credit card required. You get up to 2,500 subscribers, unlimited email sends, and access to beehiiv's core newsletter, website, and podcast tools. When you're ready to unlock monetization, advanced analytics, AI tools, and more, paid plans start at $49/month.
What is the difference between beehiiv Scale and beehiiv Max plans?
Both plans include unlimited email sends, automations, the beehiiv Ad Network, paid subscription tools, digital products, and advanced analytics. Max adds several key upgrades: the ability to remove beehiiv branding from your newsletter and website, dynamic content, priority support, and up to 10 publications per account (vs. 3 on Scale). If a white-label experience, advanced features, and faster support matter to your operation, Max is the step up worth taking.
Does beehiiv take a cut of paid newsletter revenue?
No. beehiiv takes 0% of your paid subscription revenue. You keep everything you earn, minus Stripe's standard processing fee of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. Compare that to platforms like Substack, which takes 10% off the top of every subscription.
Does beehiiv charge extra for email sends?
No. All beehiiv plans, including the free Launch plan, include unlimited email sends. You're never penalized for sending more frequently or for emailing your full list.
READY TO Build?

Frequently Asked Questions
Are all newsletter emails required to have unsubscribe options?
All newsletter emails must include unsubscribe options to comply with anti-spam regulations. This feature allows recipients to easily opt out of future communications, ensuring their rights to manage their email subscriptions are respected.
Are emailed newsletters considered a secure method of communication?
Emailed newsletters are not typically considered a secure method of communication. While they can deliver valuable content, they may be susceptible to interception and unauthorized access, making it crucial to implement additional security measures when handling sensitive information.
How does pricing affect the success of email newsletters?
The pricing of email newsletters significantly impacts their success by determining the features and services available to creators. A well-structured pricing model can provide access to advanced tools, analytics, and support that enable better audience engagement and growth.
What strategies improve open rates for email newsletters?
Effective strategies to improve open rates for email newsletters include crafting compelling subject lines, personalizing content for recipients, optimizing send times, and maintaining a clean email list to enhance engagement and reduce spam complaints.
How do email newsletter services structure their pricing models?
Email newsletter services typically structure their pricing models based on factors such as subscriber count, features offered, and the level of customer support. Plans often range from free tiers with basic functionalities to premium subscriptions with advanced analytics and customization options.
How can newsletter design impact engagement?
The design of a newsletter significantly impacts engagement by enhancing readability and visual appeal. A well-structured layout, eye-catching graphics, and clear calls-to-action can attract attention, encourage interaction, and ultimately foster greater subscriber connection and retention.
What influences email deliverability rates?
Email deliverability rates are influenced by several factors including sender reputation, email content quality, recipient engagement, authentication protocols, and the use of verified lists. Maintaining these elements ensures higher chances of successful inbox placement.
How often should newsletters be sent?
The frequency of sending newsletters should be consistent and tailored to your audience, typically ranging from weekly to monthly. This balance keeps subscribers engaged without overwhelming them.
What content boosts newsletter subscriptions?
The content that boosts newsletter subscriptions includes engaging stories, exclusive insights, valuable tips, and actionable advice tailored to your audience's interests. Consistently delivering high-quality content fosters trust and encourages more sign-ups.
Do newsletters increase customer retention?
Newsletters increase customer retention by keeping your audience engaged and informed. Regular communication fosters loyalty and helps build a stronger

With the beehiiv MCP, you get more than a dashboard — you get an AI that actually understands your business, and can act on it. It’s like adding a full-time analyst, operator, strategist, and assistant to your team.

analysis.name: Beehiiv
analysis.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one platform combining newsletters, no-code websites, podcasts, and native monetization with 0% revenue take rate.
analysis.ideal_customer: Independent creators, journalists, publishers, and media brands who want a single platform for audience building and monetization without stitching together third-party tools

features.name: newsletter builder
features.description: Inline design-and-write email editor for composing and styling newsletters
features.evidence_quote: Our newsletter builder lets you seamlessly design and style your newsletter as you write.

features.name: no-code website builder
features.description: Drag-and-drop website builder requiring no design or coding skills
features.evidence_quote: Our no-code website builder can give you a world-class website in minutes, not months.

features.name: ai website builder
features.description: Conversational AI interface to build a fully interactive website via chat
features.evidence_quote: Now, you can build a fully interactive website just by chatting with AI.

features.name: native podcast hosting
features.description: Launch, host, and monetize a podcast entirely within beehiiv
features.evidence_quote: You can now launch, host, and monetize your podcast entirely on beehiiv.

features.name: ad network
features.description: Built-in native ad marketplace connecting publishers with global brand sponsors
features.evidence_quote: Our built-in ad network does the selling for you, connecting your content with global brands.

features.name: on-demand ads
features.description: Ad opportunities that refresh every hour inside the editor, no Sunday-only wait
features.evidence_quote: Available opportunities now refresh every hour, giving you constant access to the best sponsors.

features.name: paid subscriptions
features.description: Paywall and paid subscription tier for newsletters with 0% platform take rate
features.evidence_quote: beehiiv takes 0% of your paid subscription revenue. You keep everything you earn.

features.name: digital products
features.description: Sell downloadable or access-gated digital products directly on beehiiv
features.evidence_quote: You can now sell Digital Products directly on beehiiv. No third-party tools. No redirects.

features.name: digital products (appointments)
features.description: Sell appointments or sessions as a digital product type

features.name: webinars
features.description: Host live events for up to 10,000 attendees, sell tickets in 10 currencies with native streaming
features.evidence_quote: Host live events for up to 10,000 attendees, sell tickets in 10 currencies, and stream natively.

features.name: sponsorship storefront
features.description: Self-serve storefront for direct sponsorship sales without a sales team

features.name: boosts
features.description: Paid cross-promotion network to grow subscribers by paying per verified new subscriber

features.name: referral program
features.description: Built-in referral system to incentivize existing subscribers to invite others

features.name: recommendation network
features.description: Cross-newsletter recommendation engine to surface one newsletter to another's audience

features.name: email automations
features.description: Trigger-based automation workflows for subscriber journeys

features.name: automations v4
features.description: Latest automation engine with more triggers, built-in testing, and end-to-end analytics
features.evidence_quote: More triggers. Built-in testing. Smarter analytics. True end-to-end visibility.

features.name: surveys & polls
features.description: In-newsletter and standalone surveys and polls for subscriber feedback

features.name: a/b testing
features.description: Split testing for subject lines and newsletter content

features.name: campaign analytics
features.description: Open rate, click-through, and campaign-level performance analytics

features.name: advanced website analytics
features.description: Real-time website traffic analytics with channel attribution breakdown
features.evidence_quote: You'll have a real-time view of exactly how people interact with your site.

features.name: verified clicks
features.description: Click verification to filter bot and fraudulent engagement from analytics

features.name: segmentation
features.description: Subscriber segmentation by behavior, attributes, or custom fields

features.name: dynamic content
features.description: Personalize a single newsletter issue differently per reader segment
features.evidence_quote: With Dynamic Content, you can tailor a single newsletter for every reader.

features.name: subscribe forms
features.description: Embeddable subscribe forms for external sites

features.name: pop-ups
features.description: Subscriber capture pop-ups for website and newsletter pages

features.name: magic links
features.description: One-click passwordless subscribe or login links for frictionless access

features.name: link-in-bio
features.description: Integrated link-in-bio page tied to website and content
features.evidence_quote: We're introducing beehiiv's Link in Bio, fully integrated into your website and content.

features.name: audio newsletters
features.description: Audio version of newsletter issues for listening on the go

features.name: rss to send
features.description: Automatically send newsletters generated from an RSS feed

features.name: custom domains
features.description: Custom domain support for newsletter and website

features.name: beehiiv ai
features.description: AI-powered writing assistance, recommendations, and content tools

features.name: beehiiv mcp
features.description: AI agent (MCP protocol) that understands and can act on your newsletter business data
features.evidence_quote: You get more than a dashboard — you get an AI that actually understands your business, and can act on it.

features.name: media library
features.description: Centralized asset management for images and media used in content
features.evidence_quote: The Media Library sits at the center of your creative workflow — so we rebuilt it.

features.name: getty images integration
features.description: Native Getty Images search and insertion directly inside the media library
features.evidence_quote: Getty Images is now directly integrated into our brand new media library.

features.name: api access
features.description: REST API for programmatic subscriber and publication management

features.name: send api
features.description: API endpoint for programmatically triggering email sends

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-driven webhooks for real-time integration with external systems

features.name: teams
features.description: Multi-seat team access with role-based collaboration

features.name: multi-publication management
features.description: Manage multiple publications under one account (3 on Launch/Scale, 10 on Max, custom on Enterprise)

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on for enterprise team authentication

features.name: dedicated ip addresses
features.description: Dedicated sending IPs for enterprise-grade deliverability control

features.name: optimized deliverability
features.description: Shared infrastructure tuned for inbox placement and sender reputation

features.name: remove branding
features.description: Remove beehiiv branding from newsletter footer and website

features.name: dedicated account manager
features.description: Named account manager for enterprise customers

features.name: concierge onboarding
features.description: White-glove migration and setup assistance for enterprise accounts

features.name: deliverability reports
features.description: Detailed deliverability reporting (listed as coming soon on Enterprise tier)

features.name: discord integration
features.description: Connect a Discord server as a subscriber benefit accessible from beehiiv
features.evidence_quote: Accessing a Discord server connected to beehiiv as a subscriber

features.name: embedded subscribe form
features.description: Embeddable HTML form for capturing subscribers from external websites

features.name: custom publication limits
features.description: Enterprise accounts can have more than 10 publications per account

features.name: podcast websites
features.description: Native podcast discovery pages integrated into the beehiiv website
features.evidence_quote: Your audience can now discover everything you create in one seamless experience.

features.name: unlimited email sends
features.description: No sending volume cap regardless of plan tier

differentiators: 0% take rate on paid subscription revenue vs. Substack's 10%
Industry's largest native built-in ad network
All-in-one platform: newsletter + website + podcast + monetization in one tool
beehiiv MCP — AI agent that understands and acts on your newsletter business
Boosts network for paid subscriber acquisition built natively into platform
Unlimited email sends on all plans including free

recent_ships.what: beehiiv MCP v2 — expanded capabilities, available to all users with no waitlist or paid plan required
recent_ships.source: Introducing the beehiiv MCP v2: now more powerful and available to everyone.

recent_ships.what: Webinars — host live events for up to 10,000 attendees, sell tickets in 10 currencies, native streaming
recent_ships.source: Host live events for up to 10,000 attendees, sell tickets in 10 currencies, and stream natively from beehiiv.

recent_ships.what: Native Podcast Hosting — launch, host, and monetize podcasts entirely on beehiiv
recent_ships.source: You can now launch, host, and monetize your podcast entirely on beehiiv.

recent_ships.what: beehiiv MCP v1 — AI agent interface to beehiiv business data
recent_ships.source: It's like adding a full-time analyst, operator, strategist, and assistant to your team.

recent_ships.what: Automations v4 — more triggers, built-in testing, smarter analytics
recent_ships.source: More triggers. Built-in testing. Smarter analytics. True end-to-end visibility.

recent_ships.source: Getty Images is now directly integrated into our brand new media library.

recent_ships.source: You'll have a real-time view of exactly how people interact with your site.

recent_ships.what: Dynamic Content — personalize a single newsletter differently per reader segment
recent_ships.source: With Dynamic Content, you can tailor a single newsletter for every reader.

recent_ships.what: Automations v3 — new triggers, deeper analytics, end-to-end journey visibility
recent_ships.source: New triggers. Deeper analytics. End-to-end visibility into how users move through every journey.

recent_ships.what: Digital Products — sell digital products natively without third-party tools
recent_ships.source: For the first time, your newsletter, website, and storefront all live in one place.

praised: Support responsiveness: 'Product requests, technical issues, and bug fixes are handled quickly and thoughtfully' — Sung Jae Park, Email Operations Manager
Growth velocity: 'We launched on beehiiv with nothing, scaled to over 250,000 subscribers, and got acquired all in under a year.' — Shaan Puri, Milk Road
Ease of use: 'It's an intuitive, easy-to-use, and an all-inclusive product' — Aine Stapleton, Head of Growth
Platform power for monetization and scale cited across multiple case studies (MyGolfSpy 200K, Snopes revenue)
complaints: Paywall/JWT security issue surfaced on HN: 'Beehiiv paywall bypass and leaked JWT token'
HN thread on bypassing paywalls trivially: 'Read any beehiiv site paywall/distraction free'

free_tier.limits: Up to 2,500 subscribers; 3 publications; 1 team seat; unlimited email sends

tiers.name: Launch
tiers.headline_inclusions: Newsletter, website, podcast, custom domain, campaign analytics, unlimited sends, API, beehiiv MCP

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything on Launch + ad network, boosts, 0% paid sub take rate, automations, surveys, webhooks, 3 seats

tiers.name: Max
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything on Scale + white-label, dynamic content, audio newsletters, 10 publications, unlimited seats

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything on Max + SSO, dedicated IPs, Send API, dedicated AM, concierge onboarding, custom pub limits

pricing.notes: Flat monthly price scales with subscriber count — $43/$96 are 'starting at' rates for up to 1,000 subscribers; price increases at 2.5K, 5K, 10K, 25K, 50K, 75K, 100K tiers. Stripe processing fee (2.9% + $0.30) applies to all paid subscription transactions. Annual billing saves ~$71/year on Scale and ~$157/year on Max.

recent_hn.title: I can focus for 5 hours on a tumor but not 5 minutes on someone I love
